project.title: RGS10L phosphorylation site determination Top-Down
project.projectDescription: The phosphorylation sites of 4 recombinant RGS10L variants were determined using Top-Down study.
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: each of the purified recombinant RGS10L variants was incubated with the recombinant catalytic subunit of PKA (NEB) at the 500units-to-1µg ratio for 45 minutes at 30°C.  The Top-Down analysis was carried out without further process using an Orbitrap Fusion Lumos mass spectrometer (Thermo Fisher Scientific).  The sample containing 50 ng of RGS10L was injected to a PepSwift monolithic PS-DVB capillary column (Thermo Fisher Scientific) and eluted using the acetonitrile gradient.  The MS method used in this study composed of the MS1 scan with Orbitrap at the 15,000 resolution setting and 3 data-dependent MS2 scans with Orbitrap at the 120,000 resolution setting after ETD for 8 ms.
project.dataProcessingProtocol: The data were analyzed using ProSight on the Proteome Discoverer platform (Thermo Fisher Scientific) using a RGS10L house-build proteoform database and the E. coli July 2016 proteoform database (Proteinaceous).
